_provenance.MEASURED: compute roofline+mem_gb (microbench/nvidia-smi); iso_ar_surface+ar_latency (ar_microbench, monotonized); ar_bw+decode_ar_overlap (graph_chain); intra AR (intra_calib); prefill_overlap 0.98 (gemm probe); c_mb 0.0034 raw submit x structural 1/mb (dispatch probe); engine_floor_ms_by_model {8b:8.23, 70b:9.99, opt30b:12.14} = TP-only twins (c1 - roofline, head-only TP4PP1 2026-07-02); overlap_eta_by_model {70b:0.775, 8b:0.0 (raw -1.38, clamped)} = PP twins with measured F (two-run exact identification, PLANNER_MATH §9); prefill_ar_overlap 0.0 = graph_chain @ prefill shape B=2048 intra 4-GPU (exposed 2698.7us ~= isolated 2650.7us, boost 0.98x: vLLM inference TP-AR is in-stream synchronous, NO async-TP hiding — the old 0.8 was a serving-fit artifact, now RETIRED).
_provenance.PRIOR_documented: p2p 200us/10GB/s (nominal conservative NCCL send/recv allowance — bounded effect); c_chunk 0.0034 submit lower bound (engine prepare-span trace extraction TODO).
_provenance.KNOWN_LIMITS: (1) eta(8b) raw -1.38: the pp=2 step carries per-microbatch ENGINE cost not present in the pp=1 twin and degenerate with eta in one equation; needs an n_mb-sweep third run to identify c_mb(engine) separately. Clamped eta=0 under-predicts 8b PP steps ~7ms. (2) prefill_ar_overlap measured intra-node; cross-node same-mechanism expected ~0, verify when worker frees. (3) opt30b PP-twin (eta) pending worker availability.
_provenance.NOT_fit: fit_planner/fitted_params retired to legacy_fit/ and DELETED from the load path; no parameter descends from served sweep data. Serving results are evaluation-only.

intra_large_msg_surface._note: MEASURED 2026-07-02 (single-node ar_microbench, plain timing). Intra AR SATURATES ~12.7 GB/s at large msgs (no NCCL large-msg cliff intra-node). Serving-trace cross-check: 3250 AllReduce kernels in the 8B TP4PP1 trace, median 80us @512KB = 9.81 GB/s == bench. Wiring into t_allreduce_ms intra branch deferred: after the APC workload correction the prefill AR volume is small; flat decode-size level is within ~25% of the surface everywhere. Worker(Ada) surface pending (GPUs busy).

intra_decode_chain._note: MEASURED 2026-07-02 graph_chain single-node B=64 L=80: NO intra hiding in a dependent [GEMV->AR] chain (0.95x). The pattern-C 'fully hidden' hypothesis was an artifact of the APC-contaminated eval cells, resolved by the workload correction instead.

_workload_spec_finding: CRITICAL (2026-07-02): the sweep harness sends IDENTICAL prompts to all n requests and vLLM automatic prefix caching is ON by default -> the shared prompt is prefilled ONCE. All uniform-shape sweep cells therefore measured prefill_unique_frac ~= 1/n workloads (prefill_heavy cells are ~decode-only in reality: opt30b n=96 TTFT 0.3-0.8s, decode fills the wall). Workload.prefill_unique_frac models this; eval scripts pass 1/n for uniform cells, 1.0 for mixed (varied shapes). FUTURE SWEEPS: give each request a unique prompt prefix (or --no-enable-prefix-caching) to measure true per-request prefill.
_twin_identification: 2026-07-02 n_mb-sweep twins (8b TP2PP2 head-only, mb=32 c=36.84ms / mb=16 c=33.02ms): joint (eta,c_mb) identification is UNDERDETERMINED (eta is n_mb-dependent -> the constant-eta 2-equation system is inconsistent; twin B beats even eta=1 under the n_mb-weight-stream model). MEASUREMENT-DERIVED BOUNDS: physical consistency (eta in [0,1] across twin A + both cross-node PP twins with a SHARED engine c_mb) requires c_mb >= 3.8ms (kills the 3.4us CUDA-submit assumption; the engine per-microbatch cost is milliseconds). Adopted point = BAND MINIMUM (weakest overlap consistent with all measurements; a selection RULE, not a fit): c_mb=3.83ms -> eta_8b=0.635, eta_70b=0.992 (each re-inverted from its own PP twin with measured F). Point identification needs an n_mb-dependent eta model or a third instrument (future).
_serving_ar_note: SERVING per-AR (us) by (n_local, msg): identified from dedicated decode-clean twins 2026-07-02: 70b TP4@2+2 c=74.04 -> 161us@1.05MB (n2, exact); 8b TP4@2+2 c=31.10 -> 305us@512KB (n2, UPPER bound - includes small-model cross-node overhead; monotone guard keeps the direct 70b point, flooring small-msg at 161); 8b TP8@4+4 c=35.09 -> 410us@512KB (n4); graph_chain 924us@1.05MB (n4). >=2MB rows extrapolated linearly in V (bw-const). alpha-beta split is NOT identifiable from these points (non-physical signs) - the surface form avoids the split. opt30b eta=0.776 from its PP twin (c=47.76, F=12.14): eta ordering 8b 0.635 < opt30b 0.776 < 70b 0.992 monotone in size.
